title: raw_77_nanobot_n_r2_boundary_audit_v1 — F-NB-5 sister-axis collision-overlap measurement
description: Quantitative collision-overlap audit between hexa-bio NANOBOT (single-molecule architectural primitive, L0-L6) and life/therapeutic-nanobot/ (clinical-application system, L7-L9). Consumes hexa-bio L0-L6 enumeration extracted from raw_77_nanobot_actuation_v1 plus canonical handoff JSON at ~/core/canon/domains/life/therapeutic-nanobot/handoff/2026-05-28_hexa-nanobot-therapeutic-nanobot-boundary.json. Computes Jaccard collision_overlap_ratio = |L0_L6 ∩ L7_L9| / |L0_L6 ∪ L7_L9|. PASS if ratio < 0.5 per F-NB-1-c gate. Witness gracefully degrades to status=CANONICAL_PENDING with collision_overlap_ratio=null when canonical handoff JSON has not yet been published by canon canonical session.

audited_at.description: ISO8601 UTC timestamp of audit run.

falsifier.description: Primary falsifier closed by this witness.

status.description: CANONICAL_PENDING = canonical handoff JSON absent; full ratio cannot be computed; hexa-bio side mitigation already declared in N-R2.

hexa_l0_l6_primitives.description: Architectural-primitive enumeration extracted from raw_77_nanobot_actuation_v1 (L0..L6 single-machine kinetics layer).

canonical_l7_l9_primitives.description: Architectural-primitive enumeration parsed from canonical handoff JSON (L7..L9 clinical-application layer). null when canonical_handoff_present=false.

canonical_handoff_path.description: Expected canonical handoff JSON path (per .roadmap.nanobot N-R2 spec).

collision_overlap_ratio.description: Jaccard |L0_L6 ∩ L7_L9| / |L0_L6 ∪ L7_L9|. null when canonical_handoff_present=false.

deferred_to_cross_repo.description: true when canonical edits required in canon canonical session per memory/feedback_cross_repo_canonical.md.

witness_ref.description: Pointer to canonical witness location in registry.jsonl.
